texto: The things you think are the disasters in your life are not the disasters really. Almost anything can be turned around: out of every ditch, a path, if you can only see it.
autor: Hilary Mantel - Bring Up the Bodies
explicacao: Citação de Hilary Mantel - Bring Up the Bodies sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “The things you think are the disasters in your life are not the disasters really. Almost anything…” articula reflexao, henry-viii, historical-fiction em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como historical-fiction e history.
